name: Cheeseburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion together in a pan until the meat is cooked through.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan, then set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the milk, beaten eggs, shredded cheddar cheese, oregano, and black pepper.
4. Add the browned beef mixture to the bowl, stirring gently until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-40 minutes, or until set.
NOTE: You can use a pan that has been sprayed with non-stick cooking spray instead of a pie crust.
